channels.name: bot-invite
channels.topic: Get the Template Bot invite link
channels.initialMessage:
🤖 **Add Template Bot to Your Server!**

Use the `!invite` command in any server to get the bot invite link!

Or ask the bot admins for an invite link.

**Template Bot Features:**
• 🎯 `!setup` — Create server structure from templates
• 💬 `.say` — Send anonymous messages (admin only)
• 📋 `!help` — View all commands
• 🔗 `!invite` — Get bot invite link

The bot requires Administrator permission to function properly.
